name: Italian Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 large Bell peppers, cut into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 2-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken, pepperoni, and garlic; stir-fry 3 to 4 minutes or until chicken is almost done. Remove from skillet; keep warm.
4. Heat remaining ingredients except cheese to boiling in the skillet.
5. Stir-fry vegetables 3 to 4 minutes or until crisp tender.
6. Stir in chicken mixture; heat through.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Serve 4 servings.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
